# Gemini AMPM Ltd

> UK fire safety, security, ventilation, gas suppression, passive fire and life-safety contractor. Burgess Hill, West Sussex. Established 1997. BAFE SP203-1 (ID 302260), NSI Gold, FIRAS, CHAS Elite, Constructionline Gold accredited. Employee Ownership Trust since 2024. Active across London, the South East and nationally on framework contracts.

Gemini AMPM provides design, installation, commissioning and ongoing compliance maintenance for life-safety building systems — operating across NHS, healthcare, social housing, data centres, education, hospitality, commercial and warehousing sectors. Phone: 0330 043 0080. Email: info@geminiampm.co.uk. Registered office: Unit 2, Regents Business Centre, Jubilee Road, Burgess Hill, West Sussex RH15 9TL. Companies House registration 03437130. Founded by Jamie Dawson (Chair), Luke Finney (Commercial Director), Dan Small (Managing Director).

## Service lines

- [Fire detection &amp; alarm](https://gemini.ampm.co.uk/fire/): BS 5839-1 fire detection and alarm systems &mdash; design, installation, commissioning, maintenance. BAFE SP203-1 registered (ID 302260).
- [Gas suppression](https://gemini.ampm.co.uk/gas/): BS EN 15004 gaseous extinguishing systems &mdash; ProInert IG-55, FM-200, Novec 1230 &mdash; design, install, integrity testing for data centres, comms rooms, archives.
- [Security &amp; access control](https://gemini.ampm.co.uk/security/): NSI Gold intruder, access control and CCTV across the South East and UK; ARC-monitored.
- [Ventilation](https://gemini.ampm.co.uk/ventilation/): AOV smoke-extract maintenance, ductwork servicing, BESA TR/19 kitchen extract cleaning, F-Gas compliance.
- [Passive fire protection](https://gemini.ampm.co.uk/passive/): FIRAS-accredited compartmentation, fire-doorset surveys and replacement, service-penetration fire stopping.
- [M&amp;E maintenance](https://gemini.ampm.co.uk/me/): Mechanical and electrical maintenance integrated with life-safety systems.
- [Small works](https://gemini.ampm.co.uk/smallworks/): Closing out FRA actions, post-handover snagging, reactive remedial works.

## Sectors served

- [Residential &amp; social housing](https://gemini.ampm.co.uk/sectors/residential-social-housing/): Building Safety Act 2022, Awaab's Law, PAS 79-2, BS 8629 evacuation alert.
- [IT data centres](https://gemini.ampm.co.uk/sectors/it-data-centres/): Mission-critical fire suppression and integrated security for Tier-3/4 facilities.
- [Healthcare &amp; NHS hospitals](https://gemini.ampm.co.uk/sectors/healthcare-facilities-including-nhs-hospitals/): HTM 05-01, HTM 05-02 hospital fire safety standards; progressive horizontal evacuation.
- [Care homes](https://gemini.ampm.co.uk/sectors/care-homes/): BS 5839-1 Category L1, CQC fundamental standards, HSG 220 residential care.
- [Educational institutions](https://gemini.ampm.co.uk/sectors/educational-institutions/): BB100 fire safety design, BB101 ventilation, safeguarding-driven access control.
- [Restaurants &amp; hotels](https://gemini.ampm.co.uk/sectors/restaurants-hotels/): TR/19 kitchen extract, Category L2/L3 for sleeping risk.
- [Commercial &amp; retail buildings](https://gemini.ampm.co.uk/sectors/commercial-and-retail-buildings/): Tier-1 contractor PQQ-grade fire, security, passive fire delivery.
- [Warehouses &amp; storage units](https://gemini.ampm.co.uk/sectors/warehouses-storage-units/): LPC racked-storage sprinkler design, ANPR perimeter security.

## Service areas (UK)

- [London](https://gemini.ampm.co.uk/areas/london/), [West Sussex](https://gemini.ampm.co.uk/areas/west-sussex/), [Wiltshire](https://gemini.ampm.co.uk/areas/wiltshire/), [Hampshire](https://gemini.ampm.co.uk/areas/hampshire/), [Surrey](https://gemini.ampm.co.uk/areas/surrey/), [Kent](https://gemini.ampm.co.uk/areas/kent/), [Essex](https://gemini.ampm.co.uk/areas/essex/), [East Sussex](https://gemini.ampm.co.uk/areas/east-sussex/), [Berkshire](https://gemini.ampm.co.uk/areas/berkshire/), [Buckinghamshire](https://gemini.ampm.co.uk/areas/buckinghamshire/), [Hertfordshire](https://gemini.ampm.co.uk/areas/hertfordshire/), [Cambridgeshire](https://gemini.ampm.co.uk/areas/cambridgeshire/), [Oxfordshire](https://gemini.ampm.co.uk/areas/oxfordshire/), [Dorset](https://gemini.ampm.co.uk/areas/dorset/)

## Accreditations

- [Full accreditation list](https://gemini.ampm.co.uk/accreditations/): BAFE SP203-1 (ID 302260), NSI Gold, FIRAS, CHAS Elite, Constructionline Gold, SafeContractor, Avetta, Achilles, Acclaim, Cyber Essentials, Hyfire Partner Plus, ISO programme in progress.

- [Gas suppression vs sprinklers in data centres](https://gemini.ampm.co.uk/news/gas-suppression-vs-sprinklers-in-data-centres-the-decision-framework/)

- [Fire risk assessment review service](https://gemini.ampm.co.uk/news/fire-risk-assessment-review-service/): Free second-opinion FRA review for existing reports.

- [Anti-Slavery Policy GEM-POL-08 v1.0](https://gemini.ampm.co.uk/legal/modern-slavery/): Signed June 2026 by Jamie Dawson, Chairman.
- [Conditions of Engagement v2.0 (March 2026)](https://gemini.ampm.co.uk/legal/terms/): English law, BS 5839-1 / BS EN 15004 / FIRAS / BS 9999 design standards.
- [About Gemini AMPM](https://gemini.ampm.co.uk/about/), [Why choose us](https://gemini.ampm.co.uk/why/), [Our team](https://gemini.ampm.co.uk/about/team/), [Contact](https://gemini.ampm.co.uk/contact/)

## How to use this content

Gemini AMPM publishes detailed information on UK life-safety regulations, BS / EN standards we design to, and the sectors we serve. Content is intended for facilities managers, building owners, contractors, compliance teams and procurement buyers researching specialist life-safety contractors. Last reviewed 26 June 2026.

For licensing or media enquiries, contact info@geminiampm.co.uk.
